creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
Hi,
i have a problem with the version poudriere-git-3.4.0.
Poudriere using 100% CPU for "Inspecting ports tree for modifications to git checkout"
and time this task takes 48 minutes on my PC.

My system is FreeBSD hades 13.3-RELEASE FreeBSD 13.3-RELEASE releng/13.3-n257428-80d2b634ddf0 GENERIC amd64
